examples: This film made him the most bankable star in Hollywood.
The movie's success has made her one of the world's most bankable stars.
Stone is usually on the money — and Gekko’s such a bankable monster.
And Hanks, while undeniably bankable, is, at 50, no longer viable for most leading-man scripts.
"Eventually sustainability will be bankable, " said Jim Durrett of the Metro Atlanta Chamber of Commerce.
